name: RavenClaude Design System
notes: RavenClaude's own design system on claude.ai/design — tokens, core components (Button/Card/Badge/Input/Pill/PostureToggle/Stat/Tabs/Rule/Eyebrow), guidelines, and ui_kits for the dashboard + portal. Read as context via the DesignSync tool (get_file) or edit via the /design-sync skill (plan-gated). project_id is a non-secret UUID.
